title: Syracuse University doesn’t have to pay taxes on student center after all, judges say
summary: Syracuse University's Schine Student Center has been ruled tax-exempt by judges, reversing a previous tax liability determination. This decision affects municipal tax revenue and represents a significant outcome in ongoing tax classification disputes involving the university and the city.

political_signal.description: Court ruling on institutional tax-exempt status directly impacts city budget planning and tax revenue projections. Decision favors university over municipal coffers.
